Before the hype, there was The King!

George Weah, 1995. The ONLY African player to ever win the Ballon d'Or. Period. His raw power, searing pace, and unbelievable solo goals for AC Milan were legendary. He didn't just play among giants; he was one. No debate.

#AfricanFootball #GeorgeWeah #BallondOr #ACMilan #FootballLegends

Okay, Gooners, let's settle this ancient debate: HENRY or BERGKAMP? 🤔

The King, Thierry, was an absolute goal machine – 226 goals in 369 games for Arsenal. Pure pace, power, and clinical finishing. Unstoppable.

But Dennis Bergkamp? His vision, those assists, and the sheer artistry? He was the brain, the creator. 120 goals, 100+ assists. Who truly defined Arsenal's golden era? One scored the fireworks, the other lit the fuse. Whose impact was bigger? #Arsenal #PremierLeague #FootballLegends

RvN vs Henry: The ultimate 00s striker debate!

Ruud van Nistelrooy hit 150 goals in 219 Man Utd games. Thierry Henry? 228 in 377 for Arsenal. Pure volume favors Titi, but RvN's almost mythical ruthlessness in the box was a different beast. Who truly terrified PL defenders more? Your pick 👇 #PLLegends #FootballHistory
